data.title: Hong Kong's Secondary Home Prices Reach Two-Year High
data.description: Hong Kong's secondary home prices, as indicated by the latest Centa-City Leading Index (CCL), have reached a new high of 152.17, marking a 0.85% increase from the previous week. According to RTHK, this rise reflects market conditions in the week leading up to the U.S. Federal Reserve's March meeting. In the first quarter, the CCL has risen by 5.6%, surpassing the total increase for the entire previous year.

data.title: U.S. Airline Stocks Decline in Pre-Market Trading
data.description: U.S. airline stocks experienced a downturn in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, American Airlines shares fell by 3.1%, Southwest Airlines dropped 2.2%, United Airlines decreased by 4.3%, and Delta Airlines saw a decline of 3.1%. The movement reflects broader market trends affecting the aviation sector.

data.title: South Korean President Urges Energy Conservation Amid Iran Crisis
data.description: South Korean President Lee Jae-myung has highlighted the energy crisis triggered by the situation in Iran as a 'major storm' with unpredictable duration. According to Ming Pao, he emphasized the need for citizens to 'save every drop of fuel' and prepare for a prolonged response.

data.title: Drift Attacker Acquires 1,195 ETH in Recent Transaction
data.description: A Drift attacker address recently purchased 1,195 ETH for approximately $2.45 million in USDC, according to NS3.AI. Crypto analyst Ai Yi reported that four addresses under the attacker's control now collectively hold 130,293 ETH, valued at around $266 million.

data.title: Solana Falls Below $80 Amid Market Correction and Geopolitical Concerns
data.description: Solana experienced a 6.1% decline in the past 24 hours, dropping below the $80 mark, according to CoinGecko data. This decrease occurred during a broader correction in the cryptocurrency market. According to NS3.AI, investor sentiment may have been negatively impacted by U.S. President Donald Trump's recent comments on Iran, contributing to the downturn.

data.title: Iran: If the enemy launches a ground offensive, its entire army will be annihilated.
data.description: Iranian Army Commander-in-Chief Khatami warned today (April 2) that if the enemy attempts a ground offensive, none of their soldiers will survive. He demanded that the army maintain the utmost vigilance and suspicion, constantly monitoring the enemy's movements and actions, and implementing operational plans to counter any enemy attack when appropriate. (CCTV International News)

data.title: Axe Compute releases its first annual financial report on Nasdaq.
data.description: On April 1st, Axe Compute (NASDAQ: AGPU), a Nasdaq-listed company built on the Aethir decentralized GPU network, released its FY2025 annual report, disclosing its decentralized computing power business progress to institutional investors in the form of a listed company's annual results. The report showed that the total value of contracts executed in the past 30 days was approximately $12 million, with estimated monthly revenue of $835,000 in Q2, and over 20 enterprise customers. Following the report's release, AGPU's stock price surged by as much as 152% in a single day, with daily trading volume exceeding 900 times the 20-day average, and daily trading volume exceeding $300 million. All enterprise computing power deployments are delivered through the Aethir network, covering 94 countries, over 200 nodes, more than 435,000 GPU containers, and a cumulative delivery of over 1.8 billion computing hours.

data.title: Iranian Military Chief Warns Against Ground Invasion
data.description: Iran's military chief, General Hatami, issued a stern warning on April 2, stating that any enemy forces attempting a ground invasion would face total annihilation. According to Odaily, he emphasized the need for the military to maintain maximum vigilance and skepticism, continuously monitoring enemy movements and actions. Hatami also instructed the armed forces to be prepared to implement operational plans to counter any potential attacks.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | London Mining Stocks Lead Decline Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: According to Jin10, London mining stocks emerged as the leading decliners in the UK stock market. This downturn follows U.S. President Donald Trump's recent statements, which dashed hopes for easing Middle East tensions, leading to a broad decline in precious metal prices. In a speech on Wednesday evening, Trump vowed to launch 'extremely fierce' attacks on Iran in the coming weeks. Among the FTSE 100 index constituents, Fresnillo, Endeavour Mining, Antofagasta, and Anglo American were at the forefront of the decline, with drops of 5.8%, 5.3%, 3.85%, and 3.7%, respectively. Additionally, South African gold miner Harmony Gold fell by 5.5%.

data.title: Binance Alpha: The minimum requirement to claim the CHECK airdrop is 242 points, and claiming it will consume 15 points.
data.description: Binance Alpha is launching the Checkmate (CHECK) airdrop event. Users need to hold at least 242 points to participate. Eligible users can claim 500 CHECK tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the reward pool is not fully distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 points, and users must complete the claim confirmation on the Alpha event page within 24 hours, otherwise it will be considered as a forfeiture of the claim.

data.title: Binance Academy Launches Free Course on Decentralized Education Protocol
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, introducing Binance Academy's latest educational initiative in collaboration with Open Campus, a community-led Web3 education protocol. This partnership aims to decentralize the education industry, offering a free course on the project and its dedicated layer-3 blockchain, EDU Chain. The course is designed for individuals interested in decentralized education, EduFi, and $EDU tokenomics, providing insights into the foundations of Open Campus and its expanding ecosystem.

Through this educational effort, Binance Academy and Open Campus invite educators, learners, and institutions to participate in shaping the future of the education industry powered by Web3 applications. Open Campus envisions a world where learning is accessible to everyone, everywhere, and its layer-3 protocol, EDU Chain, is reforming the way teachers and learners interact. By providing an alternative education system, Open Campus enables knowledge-sharing and certification beyond borders using Web3 solutions. The Open Campus Protocol, represented by the token EDU, was the 31st project on Binance Launchpad to receive funding. Building on this partnership, Binance Academy has launched a free online course for anyone curious about Open Campus’ progress in bringing together educational content globally to one tokenized platform.

The course, titled "Introduction to EDU Chain & Open Campus," consists of virtual modules led by Jonah Lau, Project Lead and Core Contributor at Open Campus and VP, Head of Portfolio at Animoca Brands. This beginner-level course offers an overview of the project's mission and the technicalities behind EDU Chain, the world's largest Web3 education ecosystem, supported by core use cases. The course is accessible to the public at no cost via Binance Academy. Course modules include topics such as "The Big Why & Meet EDU Chain," "EDU Chain Architecture & Core Use Cases," "EduFi & $EDU Tokenomics," "Governance & Community," and "EDU Chain: The Web3 Infrastructure for Learning."

EDU Chain operates as a layer-3 blockchain, offering faster transaction speeds and specialized infrastructure for educational DApps. It doesn’t rely on a single company or institution to grow; instead, it is shaped by the people who use it – builders, founders, educators, learners, and token holders – through open contribution and on-chain governance. Open Campus incentivizes teachers and publishers worldwide by tokenizing educational content, while introducing students to a new and verifiable way of learning, supported by secure digital certificates on EDU Chain and even on-chain student loans. This decentralized model empowers both teachers and learners with innovative, transparent opportunities.

Key aspects of the ecosystem include an education-focused network, verifiable credentials, EduFi (Education Finance), and the $EDU Token. Institutions can issue diplomas, certificates, and badges as non-transferable NFTs or tokens, eliminating credential fraud. The ecosystem supports on-chain student loans and incentivizes content creators, allowing them to monetize their educational materials. The project’s native token, $EDU, facilitates all transactions within the ecosystem, including rewards for users and governance. Open Campus introduces a new way of knowledge-sharing and learning while fostering an open community of educational content. The platform invites philanthropists who wish to directly support educational causes through donations, with the capability to track their donated assets through on-chain data. For those looking to contribute to the future of educational content powered by Web3, Open Campus is a compelling ecosystem to explore.

data.title: Binance to Launch United Stables Trading Tournament with 200,000 U Prize Pool
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to launch a United Stables (U) Trading Tournament, offering eligible users a chance to share a prize pool of 200,000 U in token vouchers. The promotion period is scheduled from 2026-04-02 09:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-16 09:00 (UTC). Participants must be verified new, regular users, or Binance VIP 1 users. However, liquidity providers in the Binance Spot Liquidity Provider Program and Binance Brokers are not eligible.

Eligible trading pairs for the tournament include BNB/U, ETH/U, SOL/U, BTC/U, ASTER/U, SUI/U, XRP/U, ADA/U, DOGE/U, PEPE/U, AAVE/U, AVAX/U, BCH/U, KGST/U, LINK/U, LTC/U, NEAR/U, PAXG/U, TAO/U, TRX/U, UNI/U, WLFI/U, ZEC/U, OPN/U, XAUT/U, APT/U, ENA/U, FET/U, TRUMP/U, WLD/U, and NIGHT/U. To participate, users must register by clicking the 'Join Now' button on the landing page and trade a cumulative amount of at least 500 USD equivalent in any of the eligible U pairs on Binance Spot during the promotion period. Rewards are calculated based on the user's trading volume relative to the total trading volume of all eligible participants, with a cap of 2,000 U in token vouchers per user.

Token vouchers will be distributed to winners by 2026-04-30 and will expire within 21 days after distribution. Users can redeem their rewards via the Profile > Rewards Hub section. The leaderboard, updated at least once every 24 hours, will display users who meet the minimum qualifying trading volume threshold. Binance reserves the right to disqualify users involved in dishonest behavior or those who tamper with the program code. The campaign's commencement and operation depend on the successful listing of the relevant token on Binance Spot, and any changes to the listing may affect the campaign's timeline.

data.title: Australia to Implement New Gambling Ad Restrictions by 2027
data.description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has announced new restrictions on gambling advertising, set to be implemented from January 2027. According to NS3.AI, these regulations aim to address concerns over the impact of gambling promotions on the public. While the new rules will bring significant changes to the advertising landscape, Polymarket remains blocked under existing Australian enforcement measures and is not directly affected by these upcoming restrictions.

data.title: Web3 Projects Urged to Improve Transparency on RootData Platform
data.description:
Web3 asset data platform RootData has issued a transparency alert on Twitter (X), highlighting missing information from several projects, including Fluid, SideShift.ai, Blackhole, Pharaoh, and Koi Finance. According to ChainCatcher, the alert calls for project teams to submit or update their data on RootData to enhance their transparency scores. RootData also announced its ongoing efforts to monitor and expose projects lacking essential information.

RootData's transparency score is designed to assess the completeness and timeliness of project information, urging project teams to claim their projects immediately. The score ranges from A to F, with lower scores indicating less comprehensive information disclosure and higher risks of misconduct, necessitating increased vigilance from investors.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump's Approval Ratings Decline Across Multiple Polls
data.description:
According to Jin10, recent polls indicate a significant decline in U.S. President Donald Trump's approval ratings. An AP-NORC poll shows that 60% of respondents disapprove of Trump's job performance, with only 38% expressing satisfaction. Similarly, a CBS/YouGov poll reports a 60% disapproval rate, while 40% approve of his handling of presidential duties.

The SSRS poll reveals a 64% disapproval rate, marking a new low with only 35% approval. The American Research Group (ARG) also notes a record low in Trump's support, with a 63% disapproval rate and 34% approval. Strength In Numbers/Verasight poll results remain unchanged since February, with 60% disapproval and 37% approval.

Quinnipiac University's poll indicates that 56% of voters disapprove of Trump's job performance, while 38% approve, consistent with early March results. A Fox News poll highlights a 59% disapproval rate, the highest since the start of his second term, surpassing records from his first term.

The Harvard CAPS/Harris Poll shows that 53% of Americans believe Joe Biden performs better on economic issues, compared to 47% for Trump. A Reuters/Ipsos poll attributes a 62% disapproval rate to rising fuel prices and widespread opposition to Trump's war on Iran, with only 36% approving of his performance.

Finally, the UMass Amherst/YouGov poll indicates that 62% of Americans oppose Trump's job performance to some degree, with 71% criticizing his handling of inflation and 61% dissatisfied with his approach to employment issues.

data.title: Metaplanet added 5,075 BTC in the first quarter, bringing its total holdings to 40,177 BTC.
data.description: Metaplanet CEO Simon Gerovich stated that the company purchased 5,075 BTC in the first quarter of 2026 at an average price of approximately $79,898, for a total investment of approximately $405.48 million. The year-to-date Bitcoin return is 2.8%. As of March 31, the company held a total of 40,177 BTC, with a total cost of approximately $4.18 billion and an average cost of approximately $104,106.

data.title: Vietnam Plans Stock Market Support Amid Iran Tensions
data.description: Vietnam's government is preparing to implement measures to support its stock market following a significant decline attributed to escalating tensions in Iran. According to Jin10, the geopolitical situation has led to increased volatility in global markets, prompting Vietnamese authorities to consider interventions to stabilize the domestic financial environment. The proposed measures aim to mitigate the impact of external factors on Vietnam's stock market and ensure investor confidence remains intact.

data.title: Metaplanet Acquires Additional Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: Metaplanet has expanded its Bitcoin holdings with a recent purchase, acquiring 5,075 BTC at an average price of approximately $79,898. According to ChainCatcher, the total investment for this acquisition amounts to around $405.48 million. Since the beginning of the year, Bitcoin has yielded a return of 2.8% for the company. As of March 31, Metaplanet's total Bitcoin holdings have reached 40,177 BTC, with a cumulative cost of approximately $4.18 billion, averaging $104,106 per Bitcoin.

data.title: Japan's Finance Minister Could Influence Yen's Future, Economist Says
data.description: Economist Hideo Kumano has highlighted the potential impact of Japan's Finance Minister Satuki Katayama on the country's monetary policy. According to Jin10, Kumano noted that the relationship between Katayama and the Bank of Japan will be crucial in determining whether the upcoming interest rate hike can successfully strengthen the yen. He warned that if Katayama's government criticizes the Bank of Japan's rate hike, it could weaken efforts to reverse the yen's depreciation. Despite Katayama's inclination towards a more relaxed monetary policy, addressing the rising cost of living remains a top priority for her administration. This task is becoming increasingly complex amid soaring energy prices. Currently, the overnight index swap market indicates a 70% probability of a rate hike by the Bank of Japan in April.

data.title: CBOE Volatility Index Sees Intraday Increase
data.description: The CBOE Volatility Index experienced an intraday rise of 2.1 points, reaching a recent level of 26.67. According to ChainCatcher, this development was reported by Jinshi News.
